designBrief.silhouette: small, slim, nose-forward dart shape — must read as fast and light
designBrief.palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a yellow faction fast recon skimmer in an alien RTS. Material: iridescent ceramic-alloy, energy lattice inlays. Palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: gyroscopic, energy lattice, floating segments, solar-forged. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: heavy armor plates, large turret. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet showcasing a sci-fi vehicle hull, specifically for a fast recon skimmer. The base material is a dark, highly iridescent ceramic-alloy, displaying subtle shifts in color as if catching light from different angles, but without any baked-in shadows or perspective. Intricate yellow and gold energy lattice inlays glow with a soft, uniform emissive light, weaving complex, non-repeating alien industrial patterns across the surface. These patterns include abstract hexagonal vents, circuit-like glyphs, and subtly raised geometric panel lines that suggest advanced, non-terrestrial manufacturing, all presented as a perfectly flat, clean material swatch with no text.

Generate a perfectly seamless, orthographic texture-sheet designed for a fast recon skimmer's sci-fi hull, presented without any perspective, baked lighting, or superimposed text. The primary surface is a deep, obsidian-like iridescent ceramic-alloy, exhibiting a faint, ethereal sheen that shifts subtly between muted dark tones and hints of deep violet without actual reflections. Embedded within this dark material are tightly integrated yellow and gold emissive energy lattice inlays, forming highly intricate, almost microscopic, alien industrial designs that resemble interwoven crystalline circuits and segmented, organic-tech plating. These patterns are densely packed, featuring subtle relief differences and finely etched glyphs that evoke a high-tech, non-human aesthetic, ensuring the texture can tile flawlessly in any direction.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
